name: Audit Follow-up
description: Critical bugs, security, strategic features, and paper cuts surfaced by the deep audit on 2026-05-16. 25 tasks: 7 critical (vault collision, daemon auth, config-watch, silent catches, update banner, hardcoded OAuth client, launcher non-TTY), 5 strategic (sweech proxy, predictive quota, usage history, auto-backup, SweechBar→daemon HTTP), 10 paper cuts, 3 distribution/long-tail.
